name: Cash Loans
description_short: Online personal loan lender offering $1,000-$35,000 loans in Columbus, OH with same-day funding and car title loan options for borrowers with bad credit.
description_long:
Olive the Money (operating as Cash Loans) is an online personal lending platform that serves Columbus, Ohio residents seeking quick access to larger loan amounts. The company markets itself as a loan matching service that connects borrowers with lenders offering personal loans ranging from $1,000 to $35,000, positioning itself as an alternative to traditional bank lending with emphasis on speed and accessibility to those with poor credit histories.

The platform offers traditional unsecured personal loans with flexible repayment terms, competitive rates (claimed but not specified), and same-day funding capabilities. Additionally, the company explicitly offers car title loans as a collateral-based option, allowing borrowers to use their vehicle's equity to access funds with instant approval and no credit check. The application process is entirely online, requiring basic information, vehicle details (if pursuing a title loan), email, income verification, and banking information. Loan amounts range from $100 minimum up to $35,000 maximum.

Olive the Money distinguishes itself through multi-product offerings (both unsecured and secured lending), explicit willingness to work with bad credit borrowers, same-day funding claims, and the integration of car title loans alongside traditional personal loans. The company emphasizes convenience through online-only application, fast processing, and flexibility in loan purpose (debt consolidation, home improvement, medical expenses, major purchases). They provide loan amount calculators and require standard qualifying criteria including age (18+), income verification ($20,000-$30,000 minimum annually), credit score of 580 or higher preferred, and debt-to-income ratio below 40-45%.

However, this is fundamentally a loan marketplace/lead generator rather than a direct lender, which means actual terms, rates, and approval odds depend on partner lenders. The website conflates payday loans and personal loans in places (using the term "payday loan" inappropriately in the requirements section despite offering much larger amounts). Interest rates are never disclosed, making it impossible to verify competitive rate claims. Car title loans carry inherent risks of vehicle repossession. The $100 minimum loan amount shown in the form is inconsistent with the stated $1,000-$35,000 range.
pros: Same-day funding availability claimed for approved applications
Loan amounts from $1,000-$35,000 accommodate larger borrowing needs beyond typical payday loan limits
Explicitly serves borrowers with bad credit (minimum 580 credit score mentioned, with lenders specializing in fair/poor credit)
Multiple loan products: traditional unsecured personal loans and car title loans on single platform
Fixed monthly payments with clear repayment terms for personal loans (not payday-style balloon payments)
Online-only application process with no in-person visit requirements
Flexible loan usage (debt consolidation, home improvements, medical, major purchases)
cons: No interest rates or APR ranges disclosed, making it impossible to verify 'competitive rates' claim
Car title loans risk vehicle repossession if payments are missed
Appears to be a lead generator/broker connecting to partner lenders rather than direct lender—actual approval odds and terms vary
Website conflates payday loans and personal loans in requirements section, creating terminology confusion
Application form shows $100 minimum loan option inconsistent with stated $1,000-$35,000 loan range
best_for: Columbus residents needing $1,000-$35,000 for specific purposes (consolidation, home improvement, medical) with fair-to-good credit
Borrowers with bad/poor credit seeking larger loan amounts than typical payday loans offer
Vehicle owners seeking collateral-based loans with same-day approval and no credit check via title loan option
Consumers wanting fixed-payment loan products rather than payday-style short-term loans
diagnosis: Best for Columbus residents needing $1,000-$35,000 in personal loans or those with bad credit seeking collateral-based title loans with same-day funding. Main caveat: this is a loan marketplace platform (not direct lender), rates/terms depend on connected lenders, and actual approval odds are not guaranteed; car title loans carry repossession risk.
services: Car title loans with same-day instant approval and no credit check
Online loan application and approval process
Loans for borrowers with bad credit
Flexible loan usage (debt consolidation, home improvement, medical, purchases)
Vehicle-based collateral evaluation for title loans
